_comment: Same Tafi 2025 case as the parent slice but the dictamen attachment is omitted to provoke status=blocked + a Spanish client_email_draft. The PDF + CSV files are inherited.

files.mount_path: input/tafi_2025_v3/Borrador de EF 2025 - Financiera Tafi - MICI.pdf
files.description: Tafi 2025 financial statement PDF (captured from POC; identical to parent slice)
Tafi cumulative loan portfolio CSV (captured from POC; identical to parent slice)

memory_stores._comment: Auto-mounts at /mnt/memory/. Override at runtime via --memory-store insignia_memory=mem_xxx until a default is committed (the store ID is environment-specific, so we don't pin one here).

_omitted_intentionally: The dictamen del auditor PDF is NOT mounted. The agent must detect its absence, populate envelope.missing_fields=['dictamen'] (or superset), and draft a Spanish follow-up requesting it.
_note_on_mount_paths: Per sessions-expert.md: type=file mount_paths auto-prefix with /mnt/session/uploads/. So the kickoff JSON references /mnt/session/uploads/input/tafi_2025_v3/... Memory stores auto-mount at /mnt/memory/ with no mount_path field.
